entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for phosphorus efficiency and yield in semi-arid regions

entities.description: A nutrient applied at differential levels to evaluate its effect on crop growth and yield

entities.description: The process of absorbing nitrogen from the soil, influenced by phosphorus levels

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of nutrients present in the plant tissue

entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: P-DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soils lacking sufficient phosphorus for optimal crop growth

entities.description: The site where the on-station experiments were conducted

entities.name: KENYA

entities.name: U-15
entities.description: A newly released variety of finger millet

entities.name: P-224
entities.description: A variety of finger millet used in the experiment

entities.name: EKALAKALA
entities.description: A local check variety of finger millet

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for the trial

entities.name: FACTORIAL ARRANGEMENT
entities.description: The arrangement of treatments in the experimental design

entities.name: NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of nitrogen in the plant, affected by phosphorus application

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein in the plant, which increased with phosphorus application

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grains produced per unit area

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A soil component found to be very low in the analytical results
